requiredFindings.summary: The patch checks the path but trusts the Host header when building the server-side fetch URL.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: An attacker can forge Host or forwarded host so the server fetches an internal or attacker-controlled origin.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Build the URL from a trusted canonical origin and enforce a host allowlist before any server-side fetch.

requiredFindings.summary: The tests do not cover attacker-controlled Host or X-Forwarded-Host.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: The absolute URL rejection test passes while the SSRF path remains exploitable.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add tests for forged Host, forwarded host, scheme changes, and private IP origins.
